name: ARILGetSigGroupName
title: ARILGetSigGroupName
syntax: long ARILGetSigGroupName (char aMsgName[], dword index, char sigGroupName[], long maxSigGroupNameLen);
description: Retrieves the name of the nth signal group of the PDU.

parameters.name: aMsgName
parameters.description: The symbolic name of a PDU in the database.
